description: Correct the location of 'noisy' GPS points from '/home/ga/GIS_Data/noisy_gps_points.geojson' by snapping them to the nearest road segments in '/home/ga/GIS_Data/sample_lines.geojson'. Use a tolerance of 0.05 degrees and set the behavior to prefer the closest point. Export the resulting snapped points as a GeoJSON file to '/home/ga/GIS_Data/exports/snapped_points.geojson'.
